zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Peabody於大約1641年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特時，她的父親John Peabody30歲，母親Dorothy Tooley26歲。她於大約1657年與John Wood結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1719年12月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特米德萊托享年79歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特米德萊托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Peabody于大约1641年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特时，她的父亲John Peabody30岁，母亲Dorothy Tooley26岁。她于大约1657年与John Wood结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1719年12月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特米德萊托享年79岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特米德萊托。

nameMeanings.name: Peabody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname ‘peacock-body’, from Middle English pe, pey, pay (Old English pēa) ‘peacock’ + body, perhaps for a vain person who dressed ostentatiously. Compare Pea , Peacock .

History: The prominent financier and philanthropist George Peabody was born 1795 in South Danvers, now Peabody, MA. His first ancestor in America was Francis Peabody, who emigrated from England in 1635 and settled at Topsfield, MA.

variants.name: Pea
meanings: nickname from Middle English pa(we), po(we) ‘peacock’ (Old English pāwa and Old Norse pá). See Peacock . Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Pawe (Old English Pāwa), Latinized as Pavo, and derived from the nickname.
from the Middle English personal name Paw(e), a pet form of Paulin or occasionally Paul. See Pawson , Paulin .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Peabody was born about 1641, in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, her father, John Peabody, was 30 and her mother, Dorothy Tooley, was 26. She married John Wood about 1657. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 December 1719, in Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 79, and was buried in Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Peabody est née environ 1641, à Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Peabody, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Tooley, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Wood environ 1657. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1719, à Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Peabody um 1641 in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Peabody 30 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Tooley 26. Sie hat um 1657 John Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1719 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Peabody è nata il circa 1641 nel Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Peabody, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Tooley, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Wood circa 1657. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1719, nel Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Peabodyが約1641年にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトで生まれた時，父John Peabodyは30歳，母Dorothy Tooleyは26歳であった。約1657年にJohn Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1719年12月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトミッドレトウンで79歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトミッドレトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 미들레타운
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Peabody(이)가 대략 1641년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Peabody(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Tooley(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1657년 John Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1719년 12월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 미들레타운에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 미들레타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Peabody nasceu aproximadamente 1641, em Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Peabody, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Tooley, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Wood aproximadamente 1657. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1719, em Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Peabody родилась около 1641 г. в местности нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Peabody было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Tooley, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wood около 1657 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 декабря 1719 г. в местности миддлетоун, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности миддлетоун, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Peabody nació aproximadamente 1641, en Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, su papá, John Peabody, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Dorothy Tooley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Wood aproximadamente 1657. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1719, en Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Middletown, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
